goal: Deliver the committed handover artifacts — operator walkthrough, credential & ownership handover checklist, acceptance sign-off template, and post-handover access-removal checklist — that make the live human handover ceremony to Wency & Jeanette executable. (REQ-22)
why: Final phase. The actual handover is a human/business ceremony an agent cannot perform or attest to; this phase delivers the accurate, committed documents that make the ceremony executable, with all human-action items left as un-checked boxes and blank signature lines.
success_criteria: docs/handover/operator-walkthrough.md exists: numbered walkthrough covering all REQ-22 topics (login, chat, tool-trace, confirm/undo, Emails, Files, Prep), each linking into docs/operator-runbook.md, with a session-coverage checklist whose boxes are all blank.

docs/handover/credential-handover.md exists: credential & ownership handover checklist covering every account/key from docs/env-reference.md with a verify step per item, an independent-Vercel-deploy section, an acceptance sign-off tying to M1/M2/M3 exit criteria with a blank signature block, and a post-handover Qualia access-removal checklist.
No checkbox is pre-checked, no signature/date is fabricated, and no document claims a live human action has been performed.
No TODO/FIXME/placeholder text in either file.

tasks.title: Operator walkthrough for Wency & Jeanette
acceptance_criteria: Intro states it is the prepared walkthrough script and that the live session is delivered to Wency & Jeanette, not recorded here as done.

Numbered walkthrough covers every REQ-22 topic in order (login /login, chat /, tool-trace row, confirm/undo, /emails, /files, /prep), each linking into the matching section of docs/operator-runbook.md instead of duplicating it.
A session-coverage checklist table has one un-checked [ ] row per topic with blank Attendee/Date columns.
No unfilled-marker text (TODO, FIXME, not-implemented) anywhere in the file.
tasks.action: Create docs/handover/operator-walkthrough.md with an About-this-document intro (prepared script; live session not pre-filled), a numbered Walkthrough section covering the seven REQ-22 topics in order with each step linking into the matching docs/operator-runbook.md heading anchor (verified against the runbook), and a Session coverage checklist table with one [ ] row per topic and empty Attendee/Date cells. Do not duplicate runbook content.

tasks.title: Credential handover checklist, acceptance sign-off, and Qualia access-removal checklist
acceptance_criteria: Intro states it is the prepared handover artifact and that transfers, the Vercel access grant, the signature, and Qualia access removal are performed by humans during/after the ceremony — none pre-completed.

A credential & ownership handover checklist table lists every credential/access item from REQ-22 criterion 2 (Supabase URL+service-role key, Vercel access, Microsoft app registration client ID+secret, 12 mailbox IMAP/SMTP creds in mail_accounts, OPENROUTER_API_KEY, GOOGLE_API_KEY, TAVILY_API_KEY, plus SESSION_SECRET/ENCRYPTION_KEY/OPERATOR_CREDENTIALS/CRON_SECRET) each with an un-checked [ ] box and a verify step.
An Independent Vercel deploy access section gives exact steps for the client to be added as member/owner and run vercel --prod, with an un-checked verification box.
An Acceptance sign-off section restates M1/M2/M3 exit criteria as un-checked rows and provides a signature block with blank Name/Role/Date/Signature lines.
A Post-handover remove Qualia access checklist enumerates each access surface to drop/downgrade as un-checked boxes.
No unfilled-marker text, no pre-checked box, no fabricated signature/date.
tasks.action: Create docs/handover/credential-handover.md: (1) About-this-document intro; (2) Credential & ownership checklist table covering every key from docs/env-reference.md, each row with a verify step and [ ] box; (3) Independent Vercel deploy section (add client as owner, vercel --prod, [ ] verify); (4) Acceptance sign-off tying to M1/M2/M3 exit criteria with [ ] rows and a blank Name/Role/Date/Signature block; (5) Post-handover remove-Qualia-access [ ] checklist. All boxes blank.
